Notes: Unit 32 — bring to boil, bare simmer 60-90 min
Unit 67 — 5 L bags; up to 5 days
Cabbage 2mm strips; carrot thin straws; reserve 2 outer cabbage leaves for cover
Mix veg + salt; massage GENTLY 3-5 min until wet. Do NOT crush!
Layer into 5L press container; press with fist; cover with reserved outer leaves
20-22°C; 3-5 days (avg 4 days); poke to bottom daily to release gas; pH target 3.8-4.2
Texture=Crunchy (no mushy); pH 3.8-4.2; discard & restart if soft or wrong smell
